title: Plutarch, Moralia: Dialogue on Love
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Dialogue on Love.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Dialogue on Love.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Dialogue on Love': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
